description_long: This arcade game cabinet is a classic upright model with a predominantly red exterior and black trim, featuring bold branding for 'NEO-GEO' and 'SNK' on its side panels. The front panel displays a large screen with a colorful marquee above, advertising 'The King of Fighters '97' with vibrant graphics and logos. The control panel is equipped with two red joysticks and multiple colored buttons, arranged for two-player gameplay, and is decorated with a striped red-and-white pattern. The left side panel showcases a dynamic illustration of a male fighter in a white coat and red pants, while the right side features a female character in a red skirt and top, both rendered in a stylized, anime-inspired art style. The lower front section includes a coin slot mechanism and directional arrows, indicating where to insert coins for play. The back of the cabinet is plain red with ventilation grilles, lacking any decorative elements.
description: A vibrant red upright arcade game cabinet with bold NEO-GEO and SNK branding, featuring colorful side panel artwork of anime-style fighters, a large screen, and a two-player control panel with joysticks and buttons.
description_view_0: Front view showing the screen, marquee, control panel with two joysticks and multiple buttons, and a coin slot at the bottom.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the NEO-GEO and SNK logos and a large illustration of a male fighter in red and white attire.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain red surface with ventilation grilles and no artwork or controls.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring NEO-GEO and SNK logos and a large illustration of a female fighter in a red skirt and top.
attribute_screen_type: CRT display, flat front with a visible bezel, medium size typical of classic arcade cabinets.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two red joysticks and twelve colored buttons arranged for two-player side-by-side play, with a striped red-and-white background and clear player separation.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features 'The King of Fighters '97' logo in bold yellow and red text with a dynamic flame motif, set against a dark background with additional branding.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels feature large, colorful anime-style illustrations of fighters (male on the left, female on the right), with NEO-GEO, MVS, and SNK logos in white, set against a red-orange gradient background.
